channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Billie Holiday's accompanist. John Coltrane's collaborator. …
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Billie Holiday's accompanist. John Coltrane's collaborator. ECM's very first artist. Mal Waldron's legacy reaches far beyond the spotlight.
item.content:encoded: Billie Holiday's accompanist. John Coltrane's collaborator. ECM's very first artist. Mal Waldron's legacy reaches far beyond the spotlight.

item.title: After offering Twin Temple a gig (because Charley Crockett d…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
After offering Twin Temple a gig (because Charley Crockett dropped them) Jack White also responded to a fan who asked him how, “as a practicing Catholic,” he could promote the satanic doo-wop duo…

👉 stereogum.com/2504853/jack...
item.content:encoded:
After offering Twin Temple a gig (because Charley Crockett dropped them) Jack White also responded to a fan who asked him how, “as a practicing Catholic,” he could promote the satanic doo-wop duo…

👉 stereogum.com/2504853/jack...

item.title: July's crop of notable releases features new work from Colso…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: July's crop of notable releases features new work from Colson Whitehead, Sigrid Nuñez, Daniel Mason and Nathaniel Rich. Plus, new nonfiction from award-winning journalists.
item.content:encoded: July's crop of notable releases features new work from Colson Whitehead, Sigrid Nuñez, Daniel Mason and Nathaniel Rich. Plus, new nonfiction from award-winning journalists.

item.title: The Summer Hotlist spotlights the upcoming albums generating…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: The Summer Hotlist spotlights the upcoming albums generating the most excitement on Bandcamp, based on fan pre-orders. Which releases are at the top of your list?
item.content:encoded: The Summer Hotlist spotlights the upcoming albums generating the most excitement on Bandcamp, based on fan pre-orders. Which releases are at the top of your list?

item.title: The Trump administration finalized a rule Friday that change…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Trump administration finalized a rule Friday that changes how agencies enforce the Endangered Species Act. The administration narrowed the definition of "harm" under the landmark law.
item.content:encoded: The Trump administration finalized a rule Friday that changes how agencies enforce the Endangered Species Act. The administration narrowed the definition of "harm" under the landmark law.

item.title: GET A JOB STAY AWAY FROM SIR
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
GET A JOB
STAY AWAY FROM SIR
item.content:encoded:
GET A JOB
STAY AWAY FROM SIR

item.title: Many older adults navigate aging on their own — without chil…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Many older adults navigate aging on their own — without children or a spouse. An expert says this is "a reality to be supported" rather than a crisis to be solved.
item.content:encoded: Many older adults navigate aging on their own — without children or a spouse. An expert says this is "a reality to be supported" rather than a crisis to be solved.

item.title: The language app Duolingo reported that roughly 296,000 peop…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The language app Duolingo reported that roughly 296,000 people around the world are studying Yiddish as of this year. An estimated 60% of them are under 25 years old. n.pr/4yfNTTT
item.content:encoded: The language app Duolingo reported that roughly 296,000 people around the world are studying Yiddish as of this year. An estimated 60% of them are under 25 years old. n.pr/4yfNTTT

item.title: A new study of people 80 and older with exceptional gaits fi…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A new study of people 80 and older with exceptional gaits finds fast walkers have about a 50% lower risk of cognitive decline, showing the connection between physical health and brain health.
item.content:encoded: A new study of people 80 and older with exceptional gaits finds fast walkers have about a 50% lower risk of cognitive decline, showing the connection between physical health and brain health.

item.title: Scott Simon and Azar Nafisi reflect on the enduring power of…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Scott Simon and Azar Nafisi reflect on the enduring power of literature. n.pr/4gyzrzT
item.content:encoded: Scott Simon and Azar Nafisi reflect on the enduring power of literature. n.pr/4gyzrzT

item.title: 【凱旋 🎉】 「久保史緒里のオールナイトニッポン」 生放送決定❗️喋って喋って喋り倒す予定 「卒業してから…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
【凱旋 🎉】
「久保史緒里のオールナイトニッポン」
生放送決定❗️喋って喋って喋り倒す予定

「卒業してからの日々を語ってこなかったのは
　この日の為…かもしれません」
https://natalie.mu/music/news/680399?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

#久保史緒里ANN
item.content:encoded:
【凱旋 🎉】
「久保史緒里のオールナイトニッポン」
生放送決定❗️喋って喋って喋り倒す予定

「卒業してからの日々を語ってこなかったのは
　この日の為…かもしれません」
https://natalie.mu/music/news/680399?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

#久保史緒里ANN

item.title: Charley Crockett shared a statement following all the attent…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
Charley Crockett shared a statement following all the attention over him dropping Twin Temple from shows because of the band's satanic imagery.

“I won't conform and I'm not sorry... Dont believe in any kind of spiritual power? I'm sorry to hear that. God is the fabric that ties all life together."
item.content:encoded:
Charley Crockett shared a statement following all the attention over him dropping Twin Temple from shows because of the band's satanic imagery.

“I won't conform and I'm not sorry... Dont believe in any kind of spiritual power? I'm sorry to hear that. God is the fabric that ties all life together."

item.title: While at college, Stephen Parker turned to his housemate whi…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: While at college, Stephen Parker turned to his housemate while in the throes of a panic attack. The care he received stuck with him for years.
item.content:encoded: While at college, Stephen Parker turned to his housemate while in the throes of a panic attack. The care he received stuck with him for years.

item.title: R.I.P. Calvin Hayes of Johnny Hates Jazz stereogum.com/2504…

item.content:encoded:

item.title: “To the assault on women’s bodily autonomy, to the abuse and…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: “To the assault on women’s bodily autonomy, to the abuse and terror being inflicted on immigrants and their families, to the erosion of voting rights and civil liberties, to the disappearance of Indigenous and Black children, so often met with silence, and to so much more suffering and injustice…”
item.content:encoded: “To the assault on women’s bodily autonomy, to the abuse and terror being inflicted on immigrants and their families, to the erosion of voting rights and civil liberties, to the disappearance of Indigenous and Black children, so often met with silence, and to so much more suffering and injustice…”

item.title: “Fiona gave me this video to share,” Zelda Hallman posted al…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
“Fiona gave me this video to share,” Zelda Hallman posted along with a rare message from her friend Fiona Apple.

“She’s been trying to find a truthful way to speak to the enormity of what’s happening in the world, from the horror in Gaza and Sudan, to the cruelty being aimed at trans kids…
item.content:encoded:
“Fiona gave me this video to share,” Zelda Hallman posted along with a rare message from her friend Fiona Apple.

“She’s been trying to find a truthful way to speak to the enormity of what’s happening in the world, from the horror in Gaza and Sudan, to the cruelty being aimed at trans kids…

item.title: Huge crowds of train fans turn out as the 1940s era Big Boy …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Huge crowds of train fans turn out as the 1940s era Big Boy steam locomotive is making a rare trip cross country. n.pr/4pf4Byx
item.content:encoded: Huge crowds of train fans turn out as the 1940s era Big Boy steam locomotive is making a rare trip cross country. n.pr/4pf4Byx

item.title: 51 years ago, Fleetwood Mac released 'Fleetwood Mac,' the ba…
item.author: Discogs (@discogsofficial.bsky.social)
item.description:
51 years ago, Fleetwood Mac released 'Fleetwood Mac,' the band's first album with Lindsey Buckingham and Stevie Nicks.

In 162,000 Collections, it's the band's 2nd most collected album on Discogs. Where does this album rank for you in their discography?
item.content:encoded:
51 years ago, Fleetwood Mac released 'Fleetwood Mac,' the band's first album with Lindsey Buckingham and Stevie Nicks.

In 162,000 Collections, it's the band's 2nd most collected album on Discogs. Where does this album rank for you in their discography?

item.title: The Times says federal agents turned up on the doorsteps of …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Times says federal agents turned up on the doorsteps of several of its journalists to force grand jury testimony next week over their coverage of the Air Force One plane gifted to Trump by Qatar. n.pr/4bwYQ9F
item.content:encoded: The Times says federal agents turned up on the doorsteps of several of its journalists to force grand jury testimony next week over their coverage of the Air Force One plane gifted to Trump by Qatar. n.pr/4bwYQ9F

item.title: In some towns in India, a visitor to the post office who's s…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: In some towns in India, a visitor to the post office who's squinting at fine print might be asked: Do you want an eye test? n.pr/4pcgS6N
item.content:encoded: In some towns in India, a visitor to the post office who's squinting at fine print might be asked: Do you want an eye test? n.pr/4pcgS6N

item.title: Trump made the comments on his Truth Social after U.S. offic…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Trump made the comments on his Truth Social after U.S. officials demanded that Iran make a public statement saying the Strait of Hormuz is open.
item.content:encoded: Trump made the comments on his Truth Social after U.S. officials demanded that Iran make a public statement saying the Strait of Hormuz is open.

item.title: VR dance lesson apps like Dance Guru and Trip the Light offe…

item.title: Hear Monde, Vol. 3 in a whole new light. Join Markus Reuter …
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Hear Monde, Vol. 3 in a whole new light. Join Markus Reuter for a Bandcamp Listening Party celebrating newly remastered editions of the Monde trilogy. Experience the updated sound together. Today at 4:00 PM EDT.
item.content:encoded: Hear Monde, Vol. 3 in a whole new light. Join Markus Reuter for a Bandcamp Listening Party celebrating newly remastered editions of the Monde trilogy. Experience the updated sound together. Today at 4:00 PM EDT.

item.title: Hundreds of masked white nationalists marched in the nation'…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Hundreds of masked white nationalists marched in the nation's capital on July Fourth. Who were they and where does their funding come from? n.pr/4vWnQPP
item.content:encoded: Hundreds of masked white nationalists marched in the nation's capital on July Fourth. Who were they and where does their funding come from? n.pr/4vWnQPP

item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)

item.content:encoded: Charli XCX performed live debuts and rarities at her Brooklyn pop-up, and she brought out surprise guests Clairo, Underscores, and Kim Petras

item.title: Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz is pulling his National Guard early …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz is pulling his National Guard early from Washington, D.C. as the chorus against Democratic governors sending troops to the city amid President Trump's ongoing deployment grows louder. n.pr/4f9uuem
item.content:encoded: Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz is pulling his National Guard early from Washington, D.C. as the chorus against Democratic governors sending troops to the city amid President Trump's ongoing deployment grows louder. n.pr/4f9uuem

item.title: One album. Two performances. Twenty years apart. We caught u…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)

item.content:encoded: One album. Two performances. Twenty years apart. We caught up with Ice Dale ahead of Between Two Worlds' long-awaited return at @fireinthemountains.bsky.social.

item.title: Spain and France will meet Tuesday in Arlington, Texas, in a…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Spain and France will meet Tuesday in Arlington, Texas, in a matchup anticipated for years. Neither team has lost at this year's World Cup. n.pr/4w2OzKM
item.content:encoded: Spain and France will meet Tuesday in Arlington, Texas, in a matchup anticipated for years. Neither team has lost at this year's World Cup. n.pr/4w2OzKM

item.title: It's been nearly four weeks since Sen. Mitch McConnell, R-Ky…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: It's been nearly four weeks since Sen. Mitch McConnell, R-Ky., was hospitalized. It's not the first time this year that a member of Congress has been absent for weeks with scant details. n.pr/4f8IxAT
item.content:encoded: It's been nearly four weeks since Sen. Mitch McConnell, R-Ky., was hospitalized. It's not the first time this year that a member of Congress has been absent for weeks with scant details. n.pr/4f8IxAT

item.title: 【「℃-uteの日」に発売】 柚木麻子、朝井リョウ、でか美ちゃんの“ハロプロ語り”が書籍化 https://nata…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
【「℃-uteの日」に発売】
柚木麻子、朝井リョウ、でか美ちゃんの“ハロプロ語り”が書籍化
https://natalie.mu/music/news/680417?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

タイトルは「柚木麻子＆朝井リョウ＆でか美ちゃんの宇宙のどこにも見当たらないようなハロプロの話を50万字しよう」。9月には大型イベントも開催予定。

#柚木朝井でか美
item.content:encoded:
【「℃-uteの日」に発売】
柚木麻子、朝井リョウ、でか美ちゃんの“ハロプロ語り”が書籍化
https://natalie.mu/music/news/680417?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

タイトルは「柚木麻子＆朝井リョウ＆でか美ちゃんの宇宙のどこにも見当たらないようなハロプロの話を50万字しよう」。9月には大型イベントも開催予定。

#柚木朝井でか美

item.title: Republicans on Capitol Hill are starting to talk about one f…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Republicans on Capitol Hill are starting to talk about one facet of immigration reform: how to expand the popular H-2A visa program for farm laborers. They face obstacles.
item.content:encoded: Republicans on Capitol Hill are starting to talk about one facet of immigration reform: how to expand the popular H-2A visa program for farm laborers. They face obstacles.

item.title: Gas prices have fluctuated since the U.S. and Israel launche…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Gas prices have fluctuated since the U.S. and Israel launched a war on Iran, which disrupted shipping through the Strait of Hormuz and left consumers unsure of what they'll pay at the pump.
item.content:encoded: Gas prices have fluctuated since the U.S. and Israel launched a war on Iran, which disrupted shipping through the Strait of Hormuz and left consumers unsure of what they'll pay at the pump.

item.title: The four biggest U.S. airlines control roughly three-quarter…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The four biggest U.S. airlines control roughly three-quarters of the market. Industry critics say consolidation is bad for passengers, but airlines say there's still healthy competition.
item.content:encoded: The four biggest U.S. airlines control roughly three-quarters of the market. Industry critics say consolidation is bad for passengers, but airlines say there's still healthy competition.

item.title: Netflix's new Little House series features the same characte…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Netflix's new Little House series features the same characters and setting as the original, but its reliance on hand-held cameras, in extreme close-up, calls too much attention to itself.
item.content:encoded: Netflix's new Little House series features the same characters and setting as the original, but its reliance on hand-held cameras, in extreme close-up, calls too much attention to itself.
